Chinese Proficiency Test Center

Exam Results

MENU

You can check your exam results on

chinesetest.cn

(either by registering or without registering) starting from the announcement date specified in the exam schedule.

Your exam result certificates are sent to our exam center by China one month after the results are announced. There is no possibility of receiving the certificates earlier. Once your certificates have arrived at our exam center, an information email will be sent to you.
